# zstack_license_authorized_capacity (Data Source)

Fetches license authorized capacity from the ZStack environment.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) ID of the license authorized capacity.
- `license_type` (String) License type.
- `name` (String) Name of the license authorized capacity.
- `node_uuid` (String) Management node UUID for this capacity record.
- `quota` (Number) Authorized quota value.
- `quota_type` (String) Quota type.
- `resource_info` (String) Resource information for this capacity record.
- `resource_uuid` (String) Resource UUID for this capacity record.
- `type` (String) Capacity type.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the license authorized capacity.
